name: Education
description: This layer shows education level for adults 25+. Counts broken down by sex. This is shown by tract, county, and state boundaries. This service is updated annually to contain the most currently released American Community Survey (ACS) 5-year data, and contains estimates and margins of error. There are also additional calculated attributes related to this topic, which can be mapped or used within analysis.  <div><br /></div><div>This layer is symbolized by the percentage of adults (25+) who were not high school graduates. To see the full list of attributes available in this service, go to the &quot;Data&quot; tab, and choose &quot;Fields&quot; at the top right. <div><br /></div><div><div><b>Current Vintage</b>: <span style="font-family:&quot;Avenir Next W01&quot;, &quot;Avenir Next W00&quot;, &quot;Avenir Next&quot;, Avenir, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, sans-serif; font-size:16px;">2019-2023</span></div><div><b>ACS Table(s)</b>: B15002</div><div><b>Data downloaded from</b>: <a>Census Bureau's API for American Community Survey</a> </div><div><b><br /></b></div><div><b>The United States Census Bureau's American Community Survey (ACS):</b></div><div><ul><li><a>About the Survey</a><br /></li><li><a>Geography &amp; ACS</a><br /></li><li><a>Technical Documentation</a><br /></li><li><a>News &amp; Updates</a><br /></li></ul><div>This ready-to-use layer can be used within ArcGIS Pro, ArcGIS Online, its configurable apps, dashboards, Story Maps, custom apps, and mobile apps. Data can also be exported for offline workflows. For more information about ACS layers, visit the <a>FAQ</a>. Please cite the Census and ACS when using this data.</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><b>Data Note from the Census:</b><br /></div><div>Data are based on a sample and are subject to sampling variability. The degree of uncertainty for an estimate arising from sampling variability is represented through the use of a margin of error. The value shown here is the 90 percent margin of error. The margin of error can be interpreted as providing a 90 percent probability that the interval defined by the estimate minus the margin of error and the estimate plus the margin of error (the lower and upper confidence bounds) contains the true value. In addition to sampling variability, the ACS estimates are subject to nonsampling error (for a discussion of nonsampling variability, see <a>Accuracy of the Data</a>).  The effect of nonsampling error is not represented in these tables.</div></div><div><br /></div><div><b>Data Processing Notes:</b></div><div><ul><li>This layer is updated automatically when the most current vintage of ACS data is released each year, usually in December. The layer always contains the latest available ACS 5-year estimates. It is updated annually within days of the Census Bureau's release schedule. <a>Click here</a> to learn more about ACS data releases.<br /></li><li>Boundaries come from the <a>US Census TIGER geodatabases,</a> specifically, the National Sub-State Geography Database (named tlgdb_(year)_a_us_substategeo.gdb). Boundaries are updated at the same time as the data updates (annually), and the boundary vintage appropriately matches the data vintage <a>as specified by the Census</a>. These are Census boundaries with water and/or coastlines erased for cartographic and mapping purposes. For census tracts, the water cutouts are derived from a subset of the <a>2020 Areal Hydrography boundaries offered by TIGER</a>. Water bodies and rivers which are 50 million square meters or larger (mid to large sized water bodies) are erased from the tract level boundaries, as well as additional important features. For state and county boundaries, the water and coastlines are derived from the coastlines of the 2022 500k <a>TIGER Cartographic Boundary Shapefiles</a>. These are erased to more accurately portray the coastlines and Great Lakes. The original AWATER and ALAND fields are still available as attributes within the data table (units are square meters).</li><li>The States layer contains 52 records - all US states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico</li><li>Census tracts with no population that occur in areas of water, such as oceans, are removed from this data service (Census Tracts beginning with 99).</li><li>Percentages and derived counts, and associated margins of error, are calculated values (that can be identified by the &quot;_calc_&quot; stub in the field name), and abide by the specifications <a>defined by the American Community Survey</a>.</li><li>Field alias names were created based on the Table Shells file available from the <a>American Community Survey Summary File Documentation page</a>.<br /></li><li>Negative values (e.g., -4444...) have been set to null, with the exception of -5555... which has been set to zero. These negative values exist in the raw API data to indicate the following situations:</li><ul><li>The margin of error column indicates that either no sample observations or too few sample observations were available to compute a standard error and thus the margin of error. A statistical test is not appropriate.</li><li>Either no sample observations or too few sample observations were available to compute an estimate, or a ratio of medians cannot be calculated because one or both of the median estimates falls in the lowest interval or upper interval of an open-ended distribution.<br /></li><li>The median falls in the lowest interval of an open-ended distribution, or in the upper interval of an open-ended distribution. A statistical test is not appropriate.</li><li>The estimate is controlled. A statistical test for sampling variability is not appropriate.<br /></li><li>The data for this geographic area cannot be displayed because the number of sample cases is too small.</li></ul></ul></div></div></div>

fields.description: {"value":"An ObjectID is a unique, not null integer field used to uniquely identify rows in tables in a geographical table.", "fieldValueType":"uniqueIdentifier"}

fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Nursery to 4th Grade (90% confidence). Those with schooling completed in foreign or ungraded school systems self-reported their equivalent level of schooling in the regular American system.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is High School (includes equivalency)
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is High School. Includes regular high school diploma or equivalency, for example, passed the General Education Development (GED) exam.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is High School (includes equivalency) - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is High School (90% confidence). Includes regular high school diploma or equivalency, for example, passed the General Education Development (GED) exam.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College, less than 1 year
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, but less than 1 year of college credit. Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_029M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College, less than 1 year - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, but less than 1 year of college credit (90% confidence). Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included. ", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_030E
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College, 1 or more years, no degree
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, 1 or more years of college credit, no degree. Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_030M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College, 1 or more years, no degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, 1 or more years of college credit, no degree (90% confidence). Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_031E
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Associate's Degree
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Associate's degree. Associate's degree programs generally require 2 years of college level work and is either an occupational program or an academic program. Course work may or may not be transferrable to a bachelor's degree.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_031M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Associate's Degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Associate's degree (90% confidence). Associate's degree programs generally require 2 years of college level work and is either an occupational program or an academic program. Course work may or may not be transferrable to a bachelor's degree.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_032E
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Bachelor's Degree
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Bachelor's degree. Bachelor's degree programs generally require 4 years of college level work primarily in the arts and sciences. Honorary degrees are not included.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_032M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Bachelor's Degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Bachelor's degree (90% confidence). Bachelor's degree programs generally require 4 years of college level work primarily in the arts and sciences. Honorary degrees are not included.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_033E
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Master's Degree
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Master's degree. Master's degree programs include the traditional MA and MS degrees and field-specific degrees such as MSW, MEd, MBA, MLS, and MEng. ", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_033M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Master's Degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Master's degree (90% confidence). Master's degree programs include the traditional MA and MS degrees and field-specific degrees such as MSW, MEd, MBA, MLS, and MEng. ", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_034E
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Professional School Degree (beyond Bachelor's)
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Professional School degree (beyond Bachelor's). Professional school degrees may include those in medicine, dentistry, chiropractic, optometry, osteopathic medicine, pharmacy, podiatry, veterinary medicine, law, and theology.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_034M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Professional School Degree (beyond Bachelor's) - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Professional School degree (beyond Bachelor's) (90% confidence). Professional school degrees may include those in medicine, dentistry, chiropractic, optometry, osteopathic medicine, pharmacy, podiatry, veterinary medicine, law, and theology.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_035E
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Doctorate Degree
fields.description: {"value":"Females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Doctorate degree. Doctorate degrees are considered \"higher\" than master's and professional school degrees.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_035M
fields.alias: Females 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Doctorate Degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for females 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Doctorate degree (90% confidence). Doctorate degrees are considered \"higher\" than master's and professional school degrees.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numLTHSE
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Less Than High School
fields.description: {"value":"Population 25 years and over who have not graduated high school (and have not passed high school equivalency exams). Esri calculated field: B15002_003E + B15002_004E + B15002_005E + B15002_006E + B15002_007E + B15002_008E + B15002_009E + B15002_010E + B15002_020E + B15002_021E + B15002_022E + B15002_023E + B15002_024E + B15002_025E + B15002_026E + B15002_027E", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numLTHSM
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Less Than High School - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for population 25 years and over who have not graduated high school (and have not passed high school equivalency exams) (90% confidence). Esri calculated field: sqrt((B15002_003M)^2 + (B15002_004M)^2 + (B15002_005M)^2 + (B15002_006M)^2 + (B15002_007M)^2 + (B15002_008M)^2 + (B15002_009M)^2 + (B15002_010M)^2 + (B15002_020M)^2 + (B15002_021M)^2 + (B15002_022M)^2 + (B15002_023M)^2 + (B15002_024M)^2 + (B15002_025M)^2 + (B15002_026M)^2 + (B15002_027M)^2)", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctLTHSE
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Less Than High School
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of population 25 years and over who have not graduated high school (and have not passed high school equivalency exams). Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B15002_calc_numLTHSE  /  B15002_001E , 1 )", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctLTHSM
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Less Than High School - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of population 25 years and over who have not graduated high school (and have not passed high school equivalency exams) (90% confidence). Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B15002_001E)*(sqrt((B15002_calc_numLTHSM)^2-1.0*((B15002_calc_numLTHSE  /  B15002_001E)^2)*(B15002_001M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numHSE
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is High School (includes equivalency)
fields.description: {"value":"Population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is High School. Includes regular high school diploma or equivalency, for example, passed the General Education Development (GED) exam. Esri calculated field: B15002_011E  +  B15002_028E", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numHSM
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is High School (includes equivalency) - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bound for population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is High School (90% confidence). Includes regular high school diploma or equivalency, for example, passed the General Education Development (GED) exam. Esri calculated field: sqrt((B15002_011M)^2  +  (B15002_028M)^2)", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctHSE
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is High School (includes equivalency)
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is High School. Includes regular high school diploma or equivalency, for example, passed the General Education Development (GED) exam. Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B15002_calc_numHSE  /  B15002_001E , 1 )", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctHSM
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is High School (includes equivalency) - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is High School (90% confidence). Includes regular high school diploma or equivalency, for example, passed the General Education Development (GED) exam. Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B15002_001E)*(sqrt((B15002_calc_numHSM)^2-1.0*((B15002_calc_numHSE  /  B15002_001E)^2)*(B15002_001M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numSomeCollE
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College
fields.description: {"value":"Population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, but no degree. Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included. Esri calculated field: B15002_012E  +  B15002_013E  +  B15002_029E  +  B15002_030E", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numSomeCollM
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, but no degree (90% confidence). Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included. Esri calculated field: sqrt((B15002_012M)^2  +  (B15002_013M)^2  +  (B15002_029M)^2  +  (B15002_030M)^2)", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctSomeCollE
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, but no degree. Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included. Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B15002_calc_numSomeCollE  /  B15002_001E , 1 )", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctSomeCollM
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Some College - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Some college credit, but no degree (90% confidence). Certificates or diplomas for training in specific trades are not included. Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B15002_001E)*(sqrt((B15002_calc_numSomeCollM)^2-1.0*((B15002_calc_numSomeCollE  /  B15002_001E)^2)*(B15002_001M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numAAE
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Associate's Degree
fields.description: {"value":"Population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Associate's degree. Associate's degree programs generally require 2 years of college level work and is either an occupational program or an academic program. Course work may or may not be transferrable to a bachelor's degree. Esri calculated field: B15002_014E  +  B15002_031E", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numAAM
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Associate's Degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Associate's degree (90% confidence). Associate's degree programs generally require 2 years of college level work and is either an occupational program or an academic program. Course work may or may not be transferrable to a bachelor's degree. Esri calculated field: sqrt((B15002_014M)^2  +  (B15002_031M)^2)", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctAAE
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Associate's Degree
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Associate's degree. Associate's degree programs generally require 2 years of college level work and is either an occupational program or an academic program. Course work may or may not be transferrable to a bachelor's degree. Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B15002_calc_numAAE  /  B15002_001E , 1 )", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctAAM
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Associate's Degree - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of population 25 years and over whose highest education completed is Associate's degree. Associate's degree programs generally require 2 years of college level work and is either an occupational program or an academic program. Course work may or may not be transferrable to a bachelor's degree (90% confidence). Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B15002_001E)*(sqrt((B15002_calc_numAAM)^2-1.0*((B15002_calc_numAAE  /  B15002_001E)^2)*(B15002_001M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numGEBAE
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Bachelor's Degree or Higher
fields.description: {"value":"Population 25 years and over who hold a Bachelor's degree. Bachelor's degree programs generally require 4 years of college level work primarily in the arts and sciences. Honorary degrees are not included. Esri calculated field: B15002_015E  +  B15002_016E  +  B15002_017E  +  B15002_018E  +  B15002_032E  +  B15002_033E  +  B15002_034E  +  B15002_035E", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_numGEBAM
fields.alias: Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Bachelor's Degree or Higher - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for population 25 years and over who hold a Bachelor's degree. Bachelor's degree programs generally require 4 years of college level work primarily in the arts and sciences. Honorary degrees are not included. Esri calculated field: sqrt((B15002_015M)^2  +  (B15002_016M)^2  +  (B15002_017M)^2  +  (B15002_018M)^2  +  (B15002_032M)^2  +  (B15002_033M)^2  +  (B15002_034M)^2  +  (B15002_035M)^2)", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctGEBAE
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Bachelor's Degree or Higher
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of population 25 years and over who hold a Bachelor's degree. Bachelor's degree programs generally require 4 years of college level work primarily in the arts and sciences. Honorary degrees are not included. Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B15002_calc_numGEBAE  /  B15002_001E , 1 )", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B15002_calc_pctGEBAM
fields.alias: Percent of Population 25 Years and Over whose Highest Education Completed is Bachelor's Degree or Higher - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of population 25 years and over who hold a Bachelor's degree. Bachelor's degree programs generally require 4 years of college level work primarily in the arts and sciences. Honorary degrees are not included. Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B15002_001E)*(sqrt((B15002_calc_numGEBAM)^2-1.0*((B15002_calc_numGEBAE  /  B15002_001E)^2)*(B15002_001M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}
